IMPORTANT1: base_model = always-on detector. scan_sr_bundle / precision_sr_bundle may be null/empty to disable.
IMPORTANT3: scan_sr runs alongside base when not ADS (or ADS w/ no locked target). precision_sr replaces scan_sr when ADS w/ locked small target. final NMS is run on the union.

input_settings.IMPORTANT: if toggle_hotkey is empty string, then it aimbot cannot be completely turned off

model._doc_bb_largest_side_threshold_override: max(h,w) of locked target below which precision_sr fires; -1 = use bundle default baked into the .pt
model._doc_precision_sr_hysteresis_frames: if precision_sr lock is missed for up to N frames, keep cropping at last known location instead of bailing to scan. 0 = disabled (legacy).

hsv_settings._doc_voting_scheme: simple (simple avg, med speed due to variable length), weighted_center (fastest due to dense computation), connected = largest connected component (more precise but can be the worst in terms of FP, slowest, also bad temporal stability if using a non simple dot)
